---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .cou-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #2d2d2d 100%);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    color: white;
  }
  .cou-hero img {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px #f0c040, 0 0 0 10px #1a1a1a;
  }
  .cou-hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: #f0c040;
    border: none;
  }
  .cou-hero .subtitle {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #cccccc;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    max-width: 600px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .cou-hero .hosts {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: #aaaaaa;
  }
  .cou-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    margin: 0.3rem;
    padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }
  .cou-btn:hover { opacity: 0.85; }
  .cou-btn-primary {
    background: #f0c040;
    color: #1a1a1a !important;
  }
  .cou-btn-secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: #f0c040 !important;
    border: 2px solid #f0c040;
  }
  .cou-section-title {
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
    border-bottom: 3px solid #f0c040;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .episode-card {
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    background: white;
  }
  .episode-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    border-color: #f0c040;
  }
  .episode-number {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #888;
    margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  }
  .episode-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    color: #1a1a1a;
  }
  .episode-meta {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: #888;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .episode-desc {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #444;
    margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .episode-tags span {
    display: inline-block;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    color: #555;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-right: 0.3rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .episode-link {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #2a7ae2;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .episode-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
  .nav-cards {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }
  .nav-card {
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1.2rem;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    color: #1a1a1a !important;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    background: white;
  }
  .nav-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    border-color: #f0c040;
  }
  .nav-card .nav-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .nav-card .nav-label { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .nav-card .nav-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #888; margin-top: 0.2rem; }
</style>

<!-- Hero -->
<div class="cou-hero">
  <img src="logo.png" alt="Corridor of Uncertainty logo">
  <h1>The Corridor of Uncertainty</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">A podcast at the intersection of maths &amp; sport — exploring what the numbers really tell us.</p>
  <p class="hosts">Hosted by <strong>Dr Jess Hargreaves</strong> &amp; <strong>Dr Rich Bingham</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Department of Mathematics, University of York</p>
  <br>
  <a class="cou-btn cou-btn-primary" href="episodes/index.html">📺 Browse Episodes</a>
  <a class="cou-btn cou-btn-secondary" href="https://www.youtube.com/@CorridorOfUncertainty" target="_blank">▶ YouTube Channel</a>
</div>

<!-- Latest Episodes -->
<p class="cou-section-title">Latest Episodes</p>

<div class="episode-card">
  <div class="episode-number">Episode 9</div>
  <div class="episode-title">Have the Dodgers Broken Moneyball?</div>
  <div class="episode-meta">📅 24 Mar 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ⏱ ~41:00</div>
  <div class="episode-desc">Exploring the origins of Moneyball, myth-busting common misconceptions, and examining how MLB teams use mathematics for competitive advantage.</div>
  <div class="episode-tags">
    <span>Baseball</span><span>Moneyball</span><span>Sabermetrics</span><span>Player Recruitment</span>
  </div>
  <a class="episode-link" href="episodes/episode-009.html">Read more →</a>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <a class="episode-link" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w43yhwejkn8" target="_blank">Watch on YouTube ↗</a>
</div>

<div class="episode-card">
  <div class="episode-number">Episode 8</div>
  <div class="episode-title">Curling by Numbers: Why GB Won Silver</div>
  <div class="episode-meta">📅 25 Mar 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ⏱ ~25:00</div>
  <div class="episode-desc">Analysing Team GB's silver medal performance at the 2026 Winter Olympics curling final against Canada through statistics and probability.</div>
  <div class="episode-tags">
    <span>Curling</span><span>Winter Olympics</span><span>Game Theory</span><span>Statistical Analysis</span>
  </div>
  <a class="episode-link" href="episodes/episode-008.html">Read more →</a>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <a class="episode-link" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noA2d75QkEM" target="_blank">Watch on YouTube ↗</a>
</div>

<div class="episode-card">
  <div class="episode-number">Episode 7</div>
  <div class="episode-title">Why Did Man City Sign Semenyo?</div>
  <div class="episode-meta">📅 25 Mar 2025 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ⏱ ~15:00</div>
  <div class="episode-desc">Exploring how football clubs use data analytics to identify and sign players, with Manchester City's signing of Antoine Semenyo as a case study.</div>
  <div class="episode-tags">
    <span>Football</span><span>Player Recruitment</span><span>Data Analytics</span><span>Transfer Market</span>
  </div>
  <a class="episode-link" href="episodes/episode-007.html">Read more →</a>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <a class="episode-link" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-v1nLR34YGA&t=303s" target="_blank">Watch on YouTube ↗</a>
</div>

<br>
<a class="episode-link" href="episodes/index.html">View all episodes →</a>

<!-- Navigation -->
<br><br>
<p class="cou-section-title">Explore</p>

<div class="nav-cards">
  <a class="nav-card" href="episodes/index.html">
    <div class="nav-icon">📋</div>
    <div class="nav-label">All Episodes</div>
    <div class="nav-desc">Full episode archive</div>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="about.html">
    <div class="nav-icon">ℹ️</div>
    <div class="nav-label">About</div>
    <div class="nav-desc">About the channel and team</div>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="upcoming.html">
    <div class="nav-icon">🔮</div>
    <div class="nav-label">Upcoming</div>
    <div class="nav-desc">What's coming next</div>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/@CorridorOfUncertainty" target="_blank">
    <div class="nav-icon">▶️</div>
    <div class="nav-label">YouTube</div>
    <div class="nav-desc">Watch on YouTube</div>
  </a>
</div>
```
